## Section 2 — Compliance Framing

Decree No. 47 (2019) establishes a suspension mechanism for non-compliant
institutions. The decree's effect is suspension pending remediation review.

## Section 3 — Institutional Response Patterns

Institutions facing regulatory action tend to respond with rapid programme
restructuring. Decree No. 47 results in loss of accreditation status until
the institution completes a remediation audit.
